# UiWidgetChild.Fields property

The child's bound fields, in serialized order (same shape as [`Fields`](../UiWidget/Fields.md)) — its `hImageFrame` handle, `nLeft/nTop/nRight/nBottom/nWidth/nHeight` rect insets, `bActive`, etc.

public IReadOnlyList<UiField> Fields { get; set; }
